phase_history.notes: Defined Nova Voice as a premium adaptive spectral smoother focused on harshness, resonance, and expensive-sounding polish with a display-first identity.
Planned a display-first Silk Spectrum UI with Smooth, Focus, Air Preserve, Body, Output, preset recall, and a Magic intelligent smoothing mode.
Created Nova Voice's pearl-and-silver UI system with a large spectral centerpiece, lavender reduction glow, and a polished luxury finishing-tool presentation.
Scaffolded the JUCE processor, WebView editor, Silk Spectrum runtime UI, preview UI, and CI workflow files using the Nova suite's stable release path.

framework_selection.rationale: WebView is the best fit for Nova Voice because the product is defined by a premium spectral display, fluid visual motion, and a luxury finishing aesthetic that benefits from high-fidelity custom UI rendering.
